# datahub_data_product (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Looks up an existing DataHub data product by `data_product_id`.

Use this to reference a data product's URN in other resources (e.g. as a `domain` reference) without taking ownership of it in Terraform state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data_product_id` (String) The unique identifier of the data product to look up (the URN suffix, e.g. `orders-v2`).

### Read-Only

- `custom_properties` (Map of String) Custom metadata properties attached to this data product.
- `description` (String) Description of the data product. Empty if not set.
- `domain` (String) Full DataHub URN of the owning domain, or empty if not set.
- `external_url` (String) External documentation URL. Empty if not set.
- `name` (String) Human-readable display name of the data product.
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this data product (e.g. `urn:li:dataProduct:orders-v2`).
